title: Anyma Says He’s ‘Truly Devastated and Deeply Sorry’ Following Canceled Coachella Set: ‘I’m Working on a Solution’
summary: Electronic musician Anyma is speaking out after his Coachella set was canceled due to severe weather condititions early Saturday morning. “I’m heartbroken,” the DJ, whose real name is Matteo Milleri, wrote in a statement shared to his X account Saturday evening. “I don’t have many words other than …
